title: Turtle Dynasty
description: Addon mod for Samurai Dynasty adding weapons of 2012 Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/333ef6d81cf407b39bb5770bdbd6d7998d04113f_0.webp)

### ⚔️Turtle Dynasty is an addon integrated for Samurai Dynasty mod, This addon is based on the 2012 Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles series, It will add the weapons of the turtles and Shredder’s claw.

![Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec421d88f08ce1afdb027a9d03a1f6ff42f13c7f.png)

### With items from the Samurai Dynasty mod you can make items like advanced handle and steel claws, and with these items you can craft the mods weapons and with steel you can make the Shredder armor.

![Recipes1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ece3472439c4607055e2fa7319b9a9acc1bcb08a.png)

### You can also craft Ninja Turtle masks.

![Recipes2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da26073a5141017acb56dffc01c311b5ffb29de0.png)

### 🚨 This mod requires:

### [Samurai Dynasty](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-samurais)


### ⚔️ This mod also features integration with the:


### [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)

### [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
